_meta.description: Social media handles for venues, orgs, and performers. Used by copy-gen to @mention in posts.
_meta.format: Keys are lowercase venue/org names. Values are platform handles (without @). null = no known handle.

performers._format: Individual artists, bands, authors, speakers, comedians. Use lowercase normalized name as key (matches the substring search in handle-lookup against event titles like 'Vienna Teng' or 'Sierra Nevada Concert Experience: Mana').
